name: Media 6 SA
summary: Media 6 SA, a point-of-purchase marketing company, provides multi-material solutions for the POP display and fitting sectors. It creates and fits retail outlets; and manufactures advertising and display materials that enhance point of purchase traffic. The company was founded in 1977 and is based in Tremblay-en-France, France. Media 6 SA operates as a subsidiary of VASCO SARL.
